case_title: ANTONIO DEL CASTILLO VS. EXPEDIA, INC. et al

NOT PRESENT, DISMISSAL FILED AS TO THEM ON SEPTEMBER 3, 2008. CASE HEARD AT 10:00 AM. PAPERWORK INDICATES ON CALENDAR AT 10:00 AM, BUT WAS ADDED TO THE CALENDAR FOR 1:30 PM.
